title: teucrium stocksianum subsp. incanum
intro: Teucrium stocksianum subsp. incanum is a plant species commonly known as the incanum mountain tea, which is a subspecies of the Teucrium stocksianum plant. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain, fever, and inflammation. The health benefits of incanum mountain tea include its ability to support respiratory health, reduce stress, and promote digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
